title: WINMAU Professional Dart Set includes Diamond Plus Bristle Dartboard - Black Cabinet - 2 Sets of Darts - Official Oche Line
features: Diamond Plus Bristle Dartboard - Tournament approved specification dartboard
Darts - Precision profile barrels with nylon shafts and Mega Standard flights
Also comes with Oche Line - Official throw line that is easy to apply and sticks to all hard surfaces
Supplied with chalk and towel for scoreboard
description: Diamond Plus Bristle Dartboard - Tournament approved specification dartboard; Darts - Precision profile barrels with nylon shafts and Mega Standard flights; Cabinet - High quality veneer-effect cabinet; Includes all fixings and instructions; Oche line (official throw line), chalk and towel for scoreboard.
